description: The UserJoinAudioIndicator component plays an audio clip when a user joins and leaves a session.

fields.JoinedClips: A list of random audio clips to choose from when a user joins the session. Each one will have a different weight.
fields.LeftClips: A list of random audio clips to choose from when a user leaves the session. Each one will have a different weight.
fields.Spatialize: Whether to play the sounds from the slot this component is on or globally.
fields.Volume: How loud the audio clips should be by default.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide some audio clips to play. The next time a user joins or leaves the session, a clip from the corresponding list will play.
